productDisplayName: Fila Men Zoom Black Casual Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Zoom makes for a great casual shoe, what with its low profile silhouette and features.UpperSynthetic leather upper with strategically placed leather and rubber overlays for absolute comfort, enhanced shoe structure and styleLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with brand name-styled lugs and brand logo styled grooves, with ergonomic grooves for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementCurved midfoot with a plastic trusstic shank for ergonomic comfortOutsole reinforced onto the backfoot as a heel guard for enhanced durabilityShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
